definition:
1. in active sense:—; to flow out  or forth , (Iliad by Homer) 
2. of feathers, to fall off , (Aristophanes Comicus) 
3. metaphorically to fall away, disappear , Lat. effluere, (Plato Philosophus) 
4. with accusative cognate to shed, let fall , χάριν [variant datesAnthology Palantina (ML)
